content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

July 19, 2005

Ms. Doreen Liberto-Blanck
370 Weymouth Street
Cambria, CA 93428

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-132

Dear Ms. Liberto-Blanck:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission has withdrawn, pursuant to your request, your June 20, 2005, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act. Consequently, the matter is closed and no response will be prepared.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: C. Scott Tocher
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

Withdrawal of 05-132:

Public official has resigned the planning commission. Public official called to withdraw the request for advice on July 18, 2005. The letter is otherwise not due out until July 22.
